description: An integration engineer must test the interaction between the hydraulic system and the flight control system on a new aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Power up the aircraft's hydraulic and flight control systems in a ground test rig.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully powers on both systems.

nodes.task_description: Run a test script that sends commands from the flight control computer to the hydraulic actuators for the control surfaces (e.g., ailerons, rudder).

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs the script and observes the control surfaces moving as commanded.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the sensor data from the actuators to ensure their response time and range of motion meet the design specifications.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the data and confirms the system performance is within spec.
